name: ACT 10 ACTION via Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Peter, will you help SAVE ACT 10?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:

We got it done with a decisive, historic margin, but to be honest, we weren’t exactly sure what the outcome would be heading into Election Night. You’ve probably noticed that right-wing extremism is on the march. In every state in America, there has been a surge in white nationalism, conspiracy theories, and QAnon-candidates running for Congress. And of course, we all watched in horror as some of those right-wing extremists laid siege to the U.S. Capitol just a few weeks ago in an unprecedented act of insurrection. [**That’s why I’m asking for your support today—will you chip in to my re-election campaign so that we can win here in Massachusetts’ 6th District?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26312641/276545061/2005830277?refcode=20210316_SM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQwYjc1Zi01MDg2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEVht5B3af3aYmZtie1CuXQkE4IwPEUXv5-3qgHMGwY=) It’s hard to know what the political landscape will look like a year from now. name: Dr. Ibraheem Samirah
subject: We’re building out our endorsement list!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
The 86th District is a diverse and interesting swath of the Commonwealth and I’m honored to have growing support in all corners of the district. Now, we need to capitalize on this momentum.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26314740/276551469/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjBhNWJlYi01Nzg2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jihl3agn0rJpIRS5h7KKBETyz5MhmG3NOt_MNlEDqV0=) Derek, Our campaign is up and running in the 86th District, and we’re already gathering the community support and endorsements that are necessary to win. It is always great to have the support of our community leaders -- **and I’m pleased to announce that I’ve won the endorsement of a supermajority of the Herndon Town Council.** Here’s the list of endorsers in Herndon:
* Herndon Vice Mayor Cesar Del Aguila
* Herndon Town Council Member Naila Alam
* Herndon Town Council Member Pradip Dhakal
* And Herndon Town Council Member Jasbinder Singh

**It’s clear that our campaign has the momentum to win this primary and move on to November and defeat our GOP opposition.** The 86th District is a diverse and interesting swath of the Commonwealth and I’m honored to have growing support in all corners of the district. Now, we need to capitalize on this momentum. We’re building out our people-powered campaign, knocking on doors, calling voters, and putting in the hard work necessary to win on June 8th. Of course, none of this is possible without the endorsement of voters like you -- so I’m honored to have your support in this race. There are more exciting things to come from the campaign trail, so I’m sure I’ll be in touch soon! Let’s keep fighting,
Delegate Ibraheem Samirah
| Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26314741/276551470/-1287071472?refcode=210315_endorse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjBhNWJlYi01Nzg2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jihl3agn0rJpIRS5h7KKBETyz5MhmG3NOt_MNlEDqV0=)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Restoring Civil Rights to over 69,000 Virginians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rASKHa5LIhNGqSAJo3n5YIQFuiYu7POFQLI1UwHRtBU=/fdZzTW8g_bqmAGQ0OOGUzDbq4uXMnbDW22tZbVJV5n8=)
---
Friend, Today, I announced that I have restored the civil rights of more than 69,000 Virginians using new eligibility criteria that mirror a proposed change to the Constitution of Virginia that would automatically restore voting rights to individuals upon completion of their sentence of incarceration. Going forward, any Virginian released from incarceration will qualify to have their rights restored, even if they remain on community supervision. Too many of our laws were written during a time of open racism and discrimination, and they still bear the traces of inequity. We are a Commonwealth that believes in moving forward, not being tied down by the mistakes of our past. If we want people to return to our communities and participate in society, we must welcome them back fully - and this policy does just that. We will enshrine this policy in our Constitution in the years ahead, but there is no reason 69,000 Virginians shouldn't have the right to vote this year. \- Ralph Northam

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rASKHa5LIhNGqSAJo3n5YIQFuiYu7POFQLI1UwHRtBU=/CdjigRy32yX94WAgyWFCibdnIwToxJZ2xPKrTliUhS4=) Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Everyone told me I was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
We got it right - liberals were wrong
| | |
---

The consensus is clear: Governor Cuomo has failed New York.

**Governor Ron DeSantis here!**

This pandemic has reinforced the absolute necessity of conservative policies and shown the repercussions of liberal ones. While Democrat governors completely locked people down and arbitrarily deemed small businesses unessential, Florida kept businesses open and kids in our schools.

**Everyone told me I was wrong. I faced continued pressure from radical Democrats and the liberal media, but I refused to back down. It's clear: Florida got it right.**

[**Now, we need GOP leaders in every state**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKG9Av1TAmlc5VNMW1eqIKtQ9mbhAK5AvVry-mMU4sqL90k5ZtSyPoRHhjRfDQZFMFlA-siTa6PixhP5yxyOwT28gBwttlsaGS-nSrwInaiqUz5p-02XDk3O6Qs0JqTAJOpL0U_tg4eiJJoAC8oaforwirtQQ39JmaClPcyRiS5v4utfmFM442WvrzETOfgdD6c1RaWlZhIP3oy2A8jCvRA5nWT1CJy7C3zWEjAytF6lsMc_PdXcOg4MiMcjK6iUWQeONvDlCtcqpL79aMSCDYAPXuwZm5ua_dD2cRKOiwpuIAny559FCKvaVvHEEniZnNM7f6ji7zpMPEjM1W2fo8dR80ZKUscTUICW-ti9LR5WHMlqNQt8kDXBrZBWoYxhpeDfz8kCkDOrYM8nz6_kne6_sL_B6HuiEHTCHaZf9aMwhfHjJB3Omg==&c=gu5f3uRnOrSY4DGuY0eZvdFCdQE44BH1AnsT887l9uuoLV_D5K1JjA==&ch=QtRkspObbUiKOAculBoaw_2vqsI_5GgAvoUVhMJIH1JhL3291qzPUQ==) who will stand up for our conservative values and refuse to back down to this administration, the liberal media, or anyone who questions our constitutionally grounded principles.**** [CHIP IN TO SUPPORT GOP LEADERS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKG9Av1TAmlc5VNMW1eqIKtQ9mbhAK5AvVry-mMU4sqL90k5ZtSyPoRHhjRfDQZFMFlA-siTa6PixhP5yxyOwT28gBwttlsaGS-nSrwInaiqUz5p-02XDk3O6Qs0JqTAJOpL0U_tg4eiJJoAC8oaforwirtQQ39JmaClPcyRiS5v4utfmFM442WvrzETOfgdD6c1RaWlZhIP3oy2A8jCvRA5nWT1CJy7C3zWEjAytF6lsMc_PdXcOg4MiMcjK6iUWQeONvDlCtcqpL79aMSCDYAPXuwZm5ua_dD2cRKOiwpuIAny559FCKvaVvHEEniZnNM7f6ji7zpMPEjM1W2fo8dR80ZKUscTUICW-ti9LR5WHMlqNQt8kDXBrZBWoYxhpeDfz8kCkDOrYM8nz6_kne6_sL_B6HuiEHTCHaZf9aMwhfHjJB3Omg==&c=gu5f3uRnOrSY4DGuY0eZvdFCdQE44BH1AnsT887l9uuoLV_D5K1JjA==&ch=QtRkspObbUiKOAculBoaw_2vqsI_5GgAvoUVhMJIH1JhL3291qzPUQ==)
**Right now, my state of Florida is one of the only states that said NO to oppressive lockdowns and has become an oasis of freedom for Americans.** Not only is Florida leading the nation when it comes to keeping businesses open and unemployment low, we're also leading the way in ensuring the integrity of our elections.

I refused to make last-minute, politically-motivated changes to our election administration, and by midnight on election night, our state had tallied 11 million votes. This year, we're leading on banning all forms of ballot trafficking AND banning third party political groups from interfering in the administration of elections. **We will never stop working to ensure that every Floridian knows: your vote counts.**

From election integrity to the freedom to earn a living, Florida is leading the fight on the issues that matter to conservatives, and is a roadmap for other states.

**[Now, we need to make sure we elect more conservative leaders](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKG9Av1TAmlc5VNMW1eqIKtQ9mbhAK5AvVry-mMU4sqL90k5ZtSyPoRHhjRfDQZFMFlA-siTa6PixhP5yxyOwT28gBwttlsaGS-nSrwInaiqUz5p-02XDk3O6Qs0JqTAJOpL0U_tg4eiJJoAC8oaforwirtQQ39JmaClPcyRiS5v4utfmFM442WvrzETOfgdD6c1RaWlZhIP3oy2A8jCvRA5nWT1CJy7C3zWEjAytF6lsMc_PdXcOg4MiMcjK6iUWQeONvDlCtcqpL79aMSCDYAPXuwZm5ua_dD2cRKOiwpuIAny559FCKvaVvHEEniZnNM7f6ji7zpMPEjM1W2fo8dR80ZKUscTUICW-ti9LR5WHMlqNQt8kDXBrZBWoYxhpeDfz8kCkDOrYM8nz6_kne6_sL_B6HuiEHTCHaZf9aMwhfHjJB3Omg==&c=gu5f3uRnOrSY4DGuY0eZvdFCdQE44BH1AnsT887l9uuoLV_D5K1JjA==&ch=QtRkspObbUiKOAculBoaw_2vqsI_5GgAvoUVhMJIH1JhL3291qzPUQ==)****who are also devoted to fighting against the Left 's most dangerous big-government policies like censorship, shutdowns, and open borders.**
[DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKG9Av1TAmlc5VNMW1eqIKtQ9mbhAK5AvVry-mMU4sqL90k5ZtSyPoRHhjRfDQZFMFlA-siTa6PixhP5yxyOwT28gBwttlsaGS-nSrwInaiqUz5p-02XDk3O6Qs0JqTAJOpL0U_tg4eiJJoAC8oaforwirtQQ39JmaClPcyRiS5v4utfmFM442WvrzETOfgdD6c1RaWlZhIP3oy2A8jCvRA5nWT1CJy7C3zWEjAytF6lsMc_PdXcOg4MiMcjK6iUWQeONvDlCtcqpL79aMSCDYAPXuwZm5ua_dD2cRKOiwpuIAny559FCKvaVvHEEniZnNM7f6ji7zpMPEjM1W2fo8dR80ZKUscTUICW-ti9LR5WHMlqNQt8kDXBrZBWoYxhpeDfz8kCkDOrYM8nz6_kne6_sL_B6HuiEHTCHaZf9aMwhfHjJB3Omg==&c=gu5f3uRnOrSY4DGuY0eZvdFCdQE44BH1AnsT887l9uuoLV_D5K1JjA==&ch=QtRkspObbUiKOAculBoaw_2vqsI_5GgAvoUVhMJIH1JhL3291qzPUQ==)
We have the chance to flip blue states as early as this fall, but in order to make that happen we need every patriot to stand with us. [**Will you chip in today to help us defeat Democrats in all 50 states?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKG9Av1TAmlc5VNMW1eqIKtQ9mbhAK5AvVry-mMU4sqL90k5ZtSyPoRHhjRfDQZFMFlA-siTa6PixhP5yxyOwT28gBwttlsaGS-nSrwInaiqUz5p-02XDk3O6Qs0JqTAJOpL0U_tg4eiJJoAC8oaforwirtQQ39JmaClPcyRiS5v4utfmFM442WvrzETOfgdD6c1RaWlZhIP3oy2A8jCvRA5nWT1CJy7C3zWEjAytF6lsMc_PdXcOg4MiMcjK6iUWQeONvDlCtcqpL79aMSCDYAPXuwZm5ua_dD2cRKOiwpuIAny559FCKvaVvHEEniZnNM7f6ji7zpMPEjM1W2fo8dR80ZKUscTUICW-ti9LR5WHMlqNQt8kDXBrZBWoYxhpeDfz8kCkDOrYM8nz6_kne6_sL_B6HuiEHTCHaZf9aMwhfHjJB3Omg==&c=gu5f3uRnOrSY4DGuY0eZvdFCdQE44BH1AnsT887l9uuoLV_D5K1JjA==&ch=QtRkspObbUiKOAculBoaw_2vqsI_5GgAvoUVhMJIH1JhL3291qzPUQ==)

I know this is not an easy task, but this is too important. So I am asking you today, hold the line, stand your ground, don't ever back down. [**Together we will defend our values and our rights.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKG9Av1TAmlc5VNMW1eqIKtQ9mbhAK5AvVry-mMU4sqL90k5ZtSyPoRHhjRfDQZFMFlA-siTa6PixhP5yxyOwT28gBwttlsaGS-nSrwInaiqUz5p-02XDk3O6Qs0JqTAJOpL0U_tg4eiJJoAC8oaforwirtQQ39JmaClPcyRiS5v4utfmFM442WvrzETOfgdD6c1RaWlZhIP3oy2A8jCvRA5nWT1CJy7C3zWEjAytF6lsMc_PdXcOg4MiMcjK6iUWQeONvDlCtcqpL79aMSCDYAPXuwZm5ua_dD2cRKOiwpuIAny559FCKvaVvHEEniZnNM7f6ji7zpMPEjM1W2fo8dR80ZKUscTUICW-ti9LR5WHMlqNQt8kDXBrZBWoYxhpeDfz8kCkDOrYM8nz6_kne6_sL_B6HuiEHTCHaZf9aMwhfHjJB3Omg==&c=gu5f3uRnOrSY4DGuY0eZvdFCdQE44BH1AnsT887l9uuoLV_D5K1JjA==&ch=QtRkspObbUiKOAculBoaw_2vqsI_5GgAvoUVhMJIH1JhL3291qzPUQ==)

Thank you,

Ron DeSantis

Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter -- Have you seen what’s happening at the border? _It’s awful.**And it’s Joe Biden’s fault.**_ _“On March 2, the Donna complex was holding more than 1,800 people — 729% of its pandemic-era capacity, which is designed for 250 migrants, according to an internal CBP document reviewed by CBS News._ _“Most of the minors said they had only showered once while in U.S. custody, even though they'd been held for more than five days, according to Desai. Some said they had showered twice.”_ — CBS News, March 12, 2021 President Trump knew what it would take to get the border under control, and he was making tremendous progress. But Joe Biden’s weak on immigration, and that weakness encouraged a HUGE spike in illegal border crossings. ICE (who the Democrats hate, by the way) is totally overwhelmed, and the situation keeps getting worse. **[We need to get our border under control, Peter, and the only way to do that is to fire these weak Democrats and put America First Republicans back in charge. clean_body: Enough is enough. Don’t you agree? | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter -- Have you seen what’s happening at the border? It’s awful.And it’s Joe Biden’s fault. “On March 2, the Donna complex was holding more than 1,800 people — 729% of its pandemic-era capacity, which is designed for 250 migrants, according to an internal CBP document reviewed by CBS News. “Most of the minors said they had only showered once while in U.S. custody, even though they'd been held for more than five days, according to Desai. Some said they had showered twice.” — CBS News, March 12, 2021 President Trump knew what it would take to get the border under control, and he was making tremendous progress. But Joe Biden’s weak on immigration, and that weakness encouraged a HUGE spike in illegal border crossings. ICE (who the Democrats hate, by the way) is totally overwhelmed, and the situation keeps getting worse. | SECURE THE BORDER EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0329848 200% TOTAL IMPACT: ACTIVE DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | | | | | | Joe Biden STOPPED construction of the border wall, Peter. Now, illegal immigrants are streaming into our nation in record numbers. Things are out of control. The situation is urgent. We need to secure our borders, and the only way to do that is by beating the Democrats and restoring President Trump’s America First immigration plan. | Thank you. Peter,

Did you catch what Andrew said on _Fox Across America_ recently? Take a listen ⬇
[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=e7cea21e64264f2b8f7ac35b9396b4a4&_e=Z5n-eOsZwGXXn3g2Dq0ms7X0O4ULpvw2-w9HuggaxV8TdlVobzcCiR2zI5Kq8OKfhDfU6qk3I6c3zd4gFbB8W7YaxCWQg1y7z_-c1aRelSIY0Mm6jfOMgpjsnfLGcLrVo8Ry0VDu7pP7THr3PuR3V_VA3QmyS1K48sgfB32ZC6da_SpNoTEZwJ39ImbYEGYNYAzW0-juGPXUp0VXQp9P5z1wtAxjQsjrkWY1efESH56ivyBvCNm4MFfCatJkmiSP7LwH5KDRigUStQdAhOTFziY3yeMhT3GbvTxvQoW6yagdw4XvnAVhTMYPbjfe6BkLLy2s7Gm3kRnpS8PvNl1iZowxVE-gWIXoeXzo2-uRw4GOwbue1MJM7-BWTM76SF3pBEGf12Pa7zpHDiEeOYnh1K1-Pb2ZPpj4MX3ASWQ_wYqk3Evexb8b42sIHg00X7vJP4dVsYkBZUzrOak84oa8VfVIk54hmDWZktcx7xQS92ZlQ0Pc8l3e-KS_o0jUOn2S)
[**Take A Listen
**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=e7cea21e64264f2b8f7ac35b9396b4a4&_e=Z5n-eOsZwGXXn3g2Dq0ms7X0O4ULpvw2-w9HuggaxV8TdlVobzcCiR2zI5Kq8OKfhDfU6qk3I6c3zd4gFbB8W7YaxCWQg1y7z_-c1aRelSIY0Mm6jfOMgpjsnfLGcLrVo8Ry0VDu7pP7THr3PuR3V_VA3QmyS1K48sgfB32ZC6da_SpNoTEZwJ39ImbYEGYNYAzW0-juGPXUp0VXQp9P5z1wtAxjQsjrkWY1efESH56ivyBvCNm4MFfCatJkmiSP7LwH5KDRigUStQdAhOTFziY3yeMhT3GbvTxvQoW6yagsueuvzmOPKwryCFTpDBmQoCX1O2lmwnyxS0IrHYLl8-nebVkwJsHT9pS130fNbGJDE6N9UeOWWA602TrAlMXOTxymH22Y60MCki04Vq4G3LT6JRfB54SjRwffo4CEmLgqlqhrVKH9uugipMPfK7b9b3HBRoaqFA3OROzKPV5e9jPchCEovEN3e4zdlznsildPkodgf9CVtic7e7YB9baP)
Andrew called out Democrats in Albany and in Congress for being **_ALL TALK_** , and **_NO ACTION_** on Cuomo!

They get in front of the cameras, fake their outrage, but then do nothing.

One moment Democrats are clamoring to take pictures with Cuomo and fawning over him; the next, they’re pretending they're going to actually hold him accountable.

**That’s why he still has emergency powers and is still locking down New York!**

Peter, we can’t trust Democrats to actually hold their own accountable; that’s why we must do everything we can to kick the Democrats out of power in 2022.

clean_body: Did you catch what Andrew said on Fox Across America recently... | | Peter, Did you catch what Andrew said on Fox Across America recently? Take a listen ⬇ Andrew called out Democrats in Albany and in Congress for being ALL TALK , and NO ACTION on Cuomo! They get in front of the cameras, fake their outrage, but then do nothing. One moment Democrats are clamoring to take pictures with Cuomo and fawning over him; the next, they’re pretending they're going to actually hold him accountable. That’s why he still has emergency powers and is still locking down New York! Peter, we can’t trust Democrats to actually hold their own accountable; that’s why we must do everything we can to kick the Democrats out of power in 2022. Peter, we deserve answers, and clearly, that’s never going to happen while Democrats control the future of our country and our state. name: Ron Johnson
subject: I will not be silenced
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Dear Friend,

"I Won't Be Silenced by the Left" is the headline the _Wall Street Journal_ attached to my [**column**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n-KUdpg1RqwoM7qx1g9Z_ARBNSQpNEEmKHAIdcR7Y4ceIK-EpIGM2tCjGeD-Rxr3CxtDYPwzylMpOHvQ2eAApcXtSYH-G_0As5lydMyerI9nq0LrA5PeJ3RpJsqw4X59vr0kmg2OhMc-_ZTBOSSZmNLFQAx0lyHV5g1-rMjRv121ZojNt_j5LCFXH0n6BJa0Yzo8YQ_1BRM_wa_IkOKFfPwm_sOMIoQ5s9c8rbCfmzEulAM40zSlJYFJEDamldwgwIjk0cQGc15m-vfg-PgdTV_T8irMXk1T&c=uaDwwsj0gqZnbkS17EtD42iBVM-IjllalJxDx3cLvPoBsre5aj-7WQ==&ch=wzWo0fs1Xnp03CaI78c6cMcmUfrfR4zfYJn3vCGkHN5HXDTRNA9NBQ==) published online on March 15th. That isn't a mere headline; it is my mission statement and commitment to all who love America and value liberty and free speech.

Most of the mainstream media abandoned all pretense of objectivity the moment Donald Trump was elected President. The radical left gained control over the majority of our universities during the Vietnam war protests, and they have been consolidating their control over our culture ever since. Colleges of education, journalism, and law have been churning out dedicated leftists for decades, and now we are experiencing the results.

Following November's election, where Democrats and the radical left gained control over the Presidency, the House, and the Senate, they moved swiftly together with their media allies to silence, censor, and cancel all conservative opposition. We simply can't let them succeed.

There is no doubt that Democrats have targeted me for extinction. In fact, **I am TARGET #1. **It has been fascinating, but not very fun, to watch how methodical and relentless they are at lying about, twisting, and distorting anything I say to marginalize and eliminate my voice that challenges their false narratives.

But their non-stop attacks will not deter me. Someone has to have the courage to counter their lies and destructive goals. I know who I am, what I believe, and what I have said. I will not let them discourage me.

[**Any help you can provide will truly be appreciated.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n-KUdpg1RqwoM7qx1g9Z_ARBNSQpNEEmKHAIdcR7Y4ceIK-EpIGM2tCjGeD-Rxr3WKNfnbxQPwyKnF5IjyOjHUPBLcR_a9TVw1n8uCa59zmSV1_TBMEninbkUEJfo6szjbhSx6dkFQmK9v2H4UOuYwDpNqBVjUZMXU3rkgCaqBx6PQragglhn7WAyPgO9Cy3Rxd8YhqbQag1jtLy1WQcSXf62rsHQ_YT2PICYQQ1R7tpu2uDIrPPg27uTa1qsxWcexav_JqLI6DevOkk-FTTE4xwlk3Y7NjaGgpi3mCoKJDzU5NWFE3xtWga_4_z6zYQMqSkoN-KZmDZI_rh8DmMXNuTAqTustr6Mt8H3qgacaQo_SmVjgp9PbIW6mElI-JUPNUY1I3uoX2jVpwc6PqRng==&c=uaDwwsj0gqZnbkS17EtD42iBVM-IjllalJxDx3cLvPoBsre5aj-7WQ==&ch=wzWo0fs1Xnp03CaI78c6cMcmUfrfR4zfYJn3vCGkHN5HXDTRNA9NBQ==) Talk to your friends, families, and neighbors. Make sure they understand what is true, what is not, and what is at stake. If you've ever thought of public service and running for office, now is the time to run for school board, county board, city council, or other elected positions.

Because the media is part of the left, liberals get their message distributed far and wide for free. Except for talk radio, a couple of cable TV channels, and print publications, conservatives have to spend money to spread our message. Any donation you can make to help me counter the left would be truly appreciated.

[**Can I count on you to chip in $35 right now to help lead the fight against the left and their media allies?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n-KUdpg1RqwoM7qx1g9Z_ARBNSQpNEEmKHAIdcR7Y4ceIK-EpIGM2tCjGeD-Rxr3WKNfnbxQPwyKnF5IjyOjHUPBLcR_a9TVw1n8uCa59zmSV1_TBMEninbkUEJfo6szjbhSx6dkFQmK9v2H4UOuYwDpNqBVjUZMXU3rkgCaqBx6PQragglhn7WAyPgO9Cy3Rxd8YhqbQag1jtLy1WQcSXf62rsHQ_YT2PICYQQ1R7tpu2uDIrPPg27uTa1qsxWcexav_JqLI6DevOkk-FTTE4xwlk3Y7NjaGgpi3mCoKJDzU5NWFE3xtWga_4_z6zYQMqSkoN-KZmDZI_rh8DmMXNuTAqTustr6Mt8H3qgacaQo_SmVjgp9PbIW6mElI-JUPNUY1I3uoX2jVpwc6PqRng==&c=uaDwwsj0gqZnbkS17EtD42iBVM-IjllalJxDx3cLvPoBsre5aj-7WQ==&ch=wzWo0fs1Xnp03CaI78c6cMcmUfrfR4zfYJn3vCGkHN5HXDTRNA9NBQ==)

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

**[**STAND UP TO THE LEFT AND THEIR MEDIA ALLIES**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n-KUdpg1RqwoM7qx1g9Z_ARBNSQpNEEmKHAIdcR7Y4ceIK-EpIGM2tCjGeD-Rxr3WKNfnbxQPwyKnF5IjyOjHUPBLcR_a9TVw1n8uCa59zmSV1_TBMEninbkUEJfo6szjbhSx6dkFQmK9v2H4UOuYwDpNqBVjUZMXU3rkgCaqBx6PQragglhn7WAyPgO9Cy3Rxd8YhqbQag1jtLy1WQcSXf62rsHQ_YT2PICYQQ1R7tpu2uDIrPPg27uTa1qsxWcexav_JqLI6DevOkk-FTTE4xwlk3Y7NjaGgpi3mCoKJDzU5NWFE3xtWga_4_z6zYQMqSkoN-KZmDZI_rh8DmMXNuTAqTustr6Mt8H3qgacaQo_SmVjgp9PbIW6mElI-JUPNUY1I3uoX2jVpwc6PqRng==&c=uaDwwsj0gqZnbkS17EtD42iBVM-IjllalJxDx3cLvPoBsre5aj-7WQ==&ch=wzWo0fs1Xnp03CaI78c6cMcmUfrfR4zfYJn3vCGkHN5HXDTRNA9NBQ==)** **[****](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n-KUdpg1RqwoM7qx1g9Z_ARBNSQpNEEmKHAIdcR7Y4ceIK-EpIGM2tCjGeD-Rxr3WKNfnbxQPwyKnF5IjyOjHUPBLcR_a9TVw1n8uCa59zmSV1_TBMEninbkUEJfo6szjbhSx6dkFQmK9v2H4UOuYwDpNqBVjUZMXU3rkgCaqBx6PQragglhn7WAyPgO9Cy3Rxd8YhqbQag1jtLy1WQcSXf62rsHQ_YT2PICYQQ1R7tpu2uDIrPPg27uTa1qsxWcexav_JqLI6DevOkk-FTTE4xwlk3Y7NjaGgpi3mCoKJDzU5NWFE3xtWga_4_z6zYQMqSkoN-KZmDZI_rh8DmMXNuTAqTustr6Mt8H3qgacaQo_SmVjgp9PbIW6mElI-JUPNUY1I3uoX2jVpwc6PqRng==&c=uaDwwsj0gqZnbkS17EtD42iBVM-IjllalJxDx3cLvPoBsre5aj-7WQ==&ch=wzWo0fs1Xnp03CaI78c6cMcmUfrfR4zfYJn3vCGkHN5HXDTRNA9NBQ==)**

clean_body: Dear Friend, "I Won't Be Silenced by the Left" is the headline the Wall Street Journal attached to my == published online on March 15th. That isn't a mere headline; it is my mission statement and commitment to all who love America and value liberty and free speech. Most of the mainstream media abandoned all pretense of objectivity the moment Donald Trump was elected President. The radical left gained control over the majority of our universities during the Vietnam war protests, and they have been consolidating their control over our culture ever since. Colleges of education, journalism, and law have been churning out dedicated leftists for decades, and now we are experiencing the results. Following November's election, where Democrats and the radical left gained control over the Presidency, the House, and the Senate, they moved swiftly together with their media allies to silence, censor, and cancel all conservative opposition. We simply can't let them succeed. There is no doubt that Democrats have targeted me for extinction. In fact, I am TARGET #1. It has been fascinating, but not very fun, to watch how methodical and relentless they are at lying about, twisting, and distorting anything I say to marginalize and eliminate my voice that challenges their false narratives. But their non-stop attacks will not deter me. Someone has to have the courage to counter their lies and destructive goals. I know who I am, what I believe, and what I have said. I will not let them discourage me. == Talk to your friends, families, and neighbors. Make sure they understand what is true, what is not, and what is at stake. If you've ever thought of public service and running for office, now is the time to run for school board, county board, city council, or other elected positions. Because the media is part of the left, liberals get their message distributed far and wide for free. Except for talk radio, a couple of cable TV channels, and print publications, conservatives have to spend money to spread our message. Any donation you can make to help me counter the left would be truly appreciated. == Thank you, Ron Johnson == == PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC. For Immediate Release

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** March 16, 2021 **CONTACT:**
Maya Harvey
[603-225-9341](tel:603-415-0304)
[Maya@nhgop.org](mailto:maya@nhgop.org "maya@nhgop.org") **Over 100 Days of Republican Government** _Today we celebrate the over 100 days of Republican government and the incredible successes New Hampshire’s witnessed under conservative leadership!_ **Concord, NH** \- New Hampshire Republican State Committee Chairman Stephen Stepanek released the following statement noting the accomplishments during the first 100 days of New Hampshire’s unified Republican government: “New Hampshire has a lot to be proud of in terms of the accomplishments our unified Republican government has achieved in the first 100 days since the new legislature was sworn in,” said NHGOP Chairman Stephen Stepanek. “As Governor Chris Sununu makes historic nominations that are confirmed by our new Republican Executive Council, Senate President Chuck Morse and House Speaker Sherm Packard are cutting taxes and protecting the lives of our most vulnerable population. Under the leadership of Governor Chris Sununu, Republicans have been able to protect and expand the New Hampshire Advantage, keeping the state’s tax free legacy intact and putting Granite Staters first.” “Acknowledging the historic successes achieved under our Republican State Government, Granite Staters can expect continued advancements in legislation and robust leadership through the remainder of their terms --- The BEST is yet to come!” ### **BACKGROUND:** _This past cycle we saw an overwhelmingly successful election in the State of New Hampshire. We obtained majorities within the Senate, House and Executive Council, in addition to re-electing Governor Chris Sununu for a third consecutive term. This made it possible for New Hampshire’s state government ‘trifecta’ to achieve some extraordinary feats through their first 100 days in office, including the confirmation of AG MacDonald as Chief Justice to the NH Supreme Court and[Ryan Terrell](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S7SQTURa-2B892x30o3Gxgrc7KhPcRz19YoMQ4UnT4dTz1txnJJ-2FG4ny2h2rOvM-2F5cFfdT7sf6pc2FuJmWcAHqmL5ofrNneW3F1ddNTAgmAiMcks0i10d1S-2FPI6jpwno6TmCqRDDMDm9UM7icmh3rZKG4-3DxkRE_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95Hs1X7NQSCYPGraqqrzlc1F26tU5TCsNfXusRP-2Fo1THWMAtMw3IbzKJM3ughvWDHC7vvx0sxor6HWYg4Doanm6X0ywskFHItqGaJTvUnW04GCBNL2AWGw-2BraopklKteT-2F2wQ1luxIoihjzMxhG0TCaA0PmGlwh555csMNY5PSjQKC8E7yzAzhMbEwl0cTbO4g7o6Hi4ovgfWGoU6pngd8LqEGZQATJU0HlxImeJDsQ8Nn4zxg42A8umDJCIaukFVXFm7ddLQpsaqK4g1iKQgHffA-3D-3D) to the State Board of Education. _ _New Hampshire Republican Representatives were able to pass the ‘Born Alive Infant Protection Act’ ensuring children who survived abortion procedures would receive the critical care they deserve. Representatives also worked in lockstep with Governor Chris Sununu to safely get our students back in the classrooms, and thanks to the Governor’s[executive order](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S-2BAUu-2BVFj3io0W5m3r1G-2BR1Zl3ClrfQqxpG7HwizXBnZ2H3rPpt5cWOiizTQm1Y7lrctqlm9-2BMcA6GAASOa12sNvi-2B4Gtbo895hbtbXq6vI5nHWffw4741Jv0yoiBYJjbg-3D-3D43Qg_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95Hs1X7NQSCYPGraqqrzlc1F26tU5TCsNfXusRP-2Fo1THWMAtMw3IbzKJM3ughvWDHC7vvx0sxor6HWYg4Doanm6Xx50IzDk-2BADiB1e5-2FXRLsIJ7ZVc7tySxaFucKCe3rbJUgeoenK8-2BVxnI462rhgtCy1R3RW2f4jrd8k8jdSSikxf-2BEXt8gW9IxhxHjTGHt9gorpuXPP5vNmd7SKLLR0kN8CTq5IvQBq113mh2eXUWiFJh8VwmhNNNTDQ8xxH4mbKC-2Fxjt1wziTwiSSAELodO7tA-3D-3D), all students have the ability to access in-person learning at least two days a week. _ _Furthermore, in terms of economic triumphs, residents can also look forward to extensive tax cuts, providing an economic boost to local businesses and residents alike. Under the leadership of Governor Chris Sununu, Republicans have been able to protect and expand the New Hampshire Advantage, keeping the state’s tax free legacy intact and putting Granite Staters first._ **Overview of Notable Republican Accomplishments** **December**
* New Republican Majorities House & Senate on December 2nd, 2020 and they quickly got to work for the people of New Hampshire, a change in pace from the previous Democrat legislature.

clean_body: For Immediate Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 16, 2021 CONTACT: Maya Harvey tel:603-415-0304 mailto:maya@nhgop.org "maya@nhgop.org" Over 100 Days of Republican Government Today we celebrate the over 100 days of Republican government and the incredible successes New Hampshire’s witnessed under conservative leadership! Concord, NH \- New Hampshire Republican State Committee Chairman Stephen Stepanek released the following statement noting the accomplishments during the first 100 days of New Hampshire’s unified Republican government: “New Hampshire has a lot to be proud of in terms of the accomplishments our unified Republican government has achieved in the first 100 days since the new legislature was sworn in,” said NHGOP Chairman Stephen Stepanek. “As Governor Chris Sununu makes historic nominations that are confirmed by our new Republican Executive Council, Senate President Chuck Morse and House Speaker Sherm Packard are cutting taxes and protecting the lives of our most vulnerable population. Under the leadership of Governor Chris Sununu, Republicans have been able to protect and expand the New Hampshire Advantage, keeping the state’s tax free legacy intact and putting Granite Staters first.” “Acknowledging the historic successes achieved under our Republican State Government, Granite Staters can expect continued advancements in legislation and robust leadership through the remainder of their terms --- The BEST is yet to come!” ### BACKGROUND: This past cycle we saw an overwhelmingly successful election in the State of New Hampshire. We obtained majorities within the Senate, House and Executive Council, in addition to re-electing Governor Chris Sununu for a third consecutive term. This made it possible for New Hampshire’s state government ‘trifecta’ to achieve some extraordinary feats through their first 100 days in office, including the confirmation of AG MacDonald as Chief Justice to the NH Supreme Court and to the State Board of Education. New Hampshire Republican Representatives were able to pass the ‘Born Alive Infant Protection Act’ ensuring children who survived abortion procedures would receive the critical care they deserve. Representatives also worked in lockstep with Governor Chris Sununu to safely get our students back in the classrooms, and thanks to the Governor’s, all students have the ability to access in-person learning at least two days a week. Furthermore, in terms of economic triumphs, residents can also look forward to extensive tax cuts, providing an economic boost to local businesses and residents alike. Under the leadership of Governor Chris Sununu, Republicans have been able to protect and expand the New Hampshire Advantage, keeping the state’s tax free legacy intact and putting Granite Staters first. Overview of Notable Republican Accomplishments December New Republican Majorities House & Senate on December 2nd, 2020 and they quickly got to work for the people of New Hampshire, a change in pace from the previous Democrat legislature. On December 11th, 2020 the new Republican controlled Joint Legislative Fiscal Accepts first batch of $46M in Federal Grants for Public Charter Schools January On January 7th, Governor Chris Sununu’s Third Term Begins along with a new Republican Executive Council. AG MacDonald renominated by Governor Chris Sununu & later confirmed by the new Republican Executive Council to be the next Chief Justice of the NH Supreme Court February Ryan Terrell renominated & confirmed to BoE; Cline, Edelblut renominated & confirmed Governor Sununu Presents his budget that cuts taxes, eliminates the I&D tax, and puts NH First by protecting and expanding the NH Advantage Governor Chris Sununu issued an Executive Order to ensure all NH Students receive at least two days a week of in-person instruction. House stands for Life by passing legislation that ends Late Term Abortions & passing the Born Alive Infant Protection Act Senate Passes Right-to-Work to increase worker freedom and expand economic growth in New Hampshire Eddie Edwards Nominated & later Confirmed to serve as Assistant Commissioner of Safety March John Formella nominated to be Attorney General Senate passes employer tax relief - Republicans will cut taxes in the budget www.nh.gop | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301 |

subject: RINO of the week: Nancy Mace (RINO-SC)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
We need America First! |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f031876f2b&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi ,

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the Chair of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. We fight the Swamp of BOTH parties, and support the best America First Conservatives around the country! [With as many RINOs as we have in DC, I need your help in that fight](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4051376c3b&e=ba6e67b849)!

I have written you so far about RINOs like Mitt Romney and Liz Cheney. Today, I'll talk to you about another one of our 2022 targets: Never-Trumper "woke" activist, Nancy Mace of South Carolina.

Now, South Carolina is a VERY conservative state. It's a state Trump won by 12 points, and has not voted for a Democrat since 1976.

Nancy Mace has been in office only since January. In a R+10 district, she beat the Democrat by a mere 1 point (worse than President Trump did). This is NOT someone who is wildly popular in South Carolina's Low Country.

_**Then she got to DC.... and went nuts.**_

She began her term by throwing President Trump under the bus:

_Republican South Carolina Rep. Nancy Mace said that President Donald Trump “put all our lives at risk” by his actions before and during the Jan. 6 riot at the U.S. Capitol._

_“I want to be a new voice for the Republican Party,” she concluded. “ _That’s one of the reasons why I’ve spoken out so strongly against the president_ , against these QAnon conspiracy theorists that led us in a constitutional crisis. It’s just wrong and we’ve got to put a stop to it.”_

**That's right- she went never-Trump to try to get ahead politically. We need LESS of that in DC, NOT more!**
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1f7c1d9462&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| _But that's not all. _

Mace also vocally supported the so-called "Equality" Act. That bill would not only penalize Biblical Christians for their beliefs, essentially making their beliefs illegal; it would also make gender-altering drugs available to minor children as young as three years old, upon request.

__**That's right, children not even old enough to read would be able to demand puberty blockers.** __

_Has the country gone off its rocker??? _

Perhaps it has- with Rep. Nancy Mace of South Carolina right there along with them.

If our country is to recover from the disastrous Biden era, we have to start with leaders with common sense. We can't have people siding with Democrats, taking up "woke" liberal causes, favoring crazy legislation.

**In other words- WE NEED PEOPLE WE CAN TRUST! **

And that person is NOT Nancy Mace- so we are going to back an America-First primary opponent.
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=42538cd441&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Nancy Mace thinks she will be a "new voice" for the party- but one that will attack Trump and promote a radical transgender agenda. **

**That is NOT what we need- the voice we need is the President's, and the agenda we need is America First!**

_Drain the DC Swamp PAC is fighting RINOs like this because that will result in better policy and less corruption_. No one ever doubts that the Dems will fall in line, even the "moderate" ones.

For the sake of our country, we need the Republicans to fall in line too- and to do that, we need to take out the RINOs, especially the vocal ones!

Leaders like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Ted Cruz, and the Freedom Caucus are what we need more of! [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=077de2e1f0&e=ba6e67b849)

---
| Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. They are Democrats-lite. We are strong America-First patriots who fight!

**President Trump wants the RINOs ousted. We are joining Trump's fight to oust the RINOs.[Help us fight for the Republic!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=49e435fe15&e=ba6e67b849)**

_The old surrendering GOP is gone. Time to make the GOP a pro-Trump, America First party. No more Cheneys, Bushes, McCains, or Romneys!_

We won't let the Never Trumpers and weak Republicans survive. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will help us give muscle to conservatives](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f9d015a521&e=ba6e67b849)- get our challengers the firepower they need to beat the establishment!

The time for navel-gazing is over. [Help us push forward and fight for America](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=dfe6115f7f&e=ba6e67b849)!

We have primaries for a reason: throwing out those that abuse our trust & good faith!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=fe3c4a9f99&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=243ec12043&e=ba6e67b849)

Drain the DC Swamp PAC

body:
Nikki is right that liberals just can't understand why people who look like me or her are Republicans. You see, Democrats and the liberal media are constantly targeting me for being a Black conservative. And I really need your help to show the country that their attacks aren't working.
Friend,

You may have seen where MSNBC host Joy Reid recently called me a superficial diversity cover for Republicans rather than a real Senator.

I'm unshaken by her ugly remarks, but I am thankful for my friend Nikki Haley's smart response.

As conservatives, we are under constant threat of censorship or being “canceled” by anyone who disagrees with us. We’ve seen everyone from... _**ALERT: I’ve had enough of the far-left’s cancel culture! **_ If you’re with me, please sign my petition today to #CANCELCancelCulture! [**SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=f3cad964d55c48b78226486f2ea0666e&_e=kU-Vjgi-S33CFE-zqHL9SqKILvN8NDiFG_Bv6BdKpdeaapEmBlO8gt5t9e2L81T_IyVxeq7svzkazleN_y7c_8nt-Rl1DxitZ7UrLOuOV3mZyKfxlwQZtNrzKIegRv60DAQQfE7CapRr8_lTUFehXGQ3KaIaNs1UME6ZH3Rd-zwNxX3PwmPWRr4dyNl5rpztw1HH6Pig8WL4UyocXP_EDM4EGBNDp8hHC6Y55tGP-2Op4SRhhcIRhOzcVfnF9leo-WVSctYbMZotXTcQPOf_AlpzwGklHqWtI7iRa5G5Ee9rxRey3aKI67xNUOK2VmEuwTnXgSG_566g-dR5v0GTaQN9mKFL3Mbsw5Zy21wrim9iRgEdvUoFIl_7OB0LrnaSkEW7ELXKOBNha7WtOLfZslQ7CxTDCLsxGA6Jikrw7GRFwKvSvvq1nDvzdIiVb_DyOtzj87ZwDEJWgbWGtVTpzyTmKPveN1rqfGt_-NE0HZc%3D) [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=f3cad964d55c48b78226486f2ea0666e&_e=kU-Vjgi-S33CFE-zqHL9SqKILvN8NDiFG_Bv6BdKpdeaapEmBlO8gt5t9e2L81T_IyVxeq7svzkazleN_y7c_8nt-Rl1DxitZ7UrLOuOV3mZyKfxlwQZtNrzKIegRv60DAQQfE7CapRr8_lTUFehXGQ3KaIaNs1UME6ZH3Rd-zwNxX3PwmPWRr4dyNl5rpztw1HH6Pig8WL4UyocXP_EDM4EGBNDp8hHC6Y55tGP-2Op4SRhhcIRhOzcVfnF9leo-WVSctYbMZotXTcQPOf_AgTbq-MFWqv5i40KTY3IqFZYpsH-dSf0VBkeRqLiQO2CxZ5489uC5j_0MhF-zW0XNnUG0VGpvqwB6SrADC0Ych_kZcS8iEIkN9vB_EbDgBU0H5dgchz3iUS92JYcRrK1pZUqOniXP6gxbcjVeqPe8q9wPI4V5DP7d_DesP1_xpGWXVugv7WcKe6Xii-4qiRhIw1IyHf9BvNsSQ22iaGx1Hk%3D) Peter, the outrage culture of the far left has gone too far. As conservatives, we are under constant threat of censorship or being “canceled” by anyone who disagrees with us. We’ve seen everyone from politicians to CEOs of private companies targeted by the left for their political opinions. It is out of control. And it’s time to say enough is enough. Let’s cancel cancel culture! [**I AGREE: Sign now >>**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=f3cad964d55c48b78226486f2ea0666e&_e=kU-Vjgi-S33CFE-zqHL9SqKILvN8NDiFG_Bv6BdKpdeaapEmBlO8gt5t9e2L81T_IyVxeq7svzkazleN_y7c_8nt-Rl1DxitZ7UrLOuOV3mZyKfxlwQZtNrzKIegRv60DAQQfE7CapRr8_lTUFehXGQ3KaIaNs1UME6ZH3Rd-zwNxX3PwmPWRr4dyNl5rpztw1HH6Pig8WL4UyocXP_EDM4EGBNDp8hHC6Y55tGP-2Op4SRhhcIRhOzcVfnF9leo-WVSctYbMZotXTcQPOf_AvqU4lk8i4Qpr2vH4NTIKXPhilFmzq5shs_lqdl02Ugaq57mk6zw5wA_mZm928AoZg3a2yFwqqJ0nI0wt9DpmryYerwM3UvHJbSZUYkrb8HuFAW-XbTNA948Aei_kZ5p93Dcr_NMBhsc5yWZe9OnltQ9eMGCkWC78t57jFvqrJyGoZQSVuLkIBXDLi6AjeEW3N4UZVIdLdPKd22wVDwuLmc%3D) Just recently, these angry liberals attempted to "cancel" me and all former Trump staff. _They said we should never work again!_ _And this happens all of the time now! _ The left attempts to cancel anyone who speaks out to praise America, President Trump, or fights to preserve our fundamental freedoms. But let me tell you, Peter, I will not be backed into a corner or silenced by the radical left. And I think it's so important we stand together and speak up! **It's time to get real and #CancelCancelCulture.** **If you agree, please add your name here:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/cancel-137423/](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=f3cad964d55c48b78226486f2ea0666e&_e=kU-Vjgi-S33CFE-zqHL9SqKILvN8NDiFG_Bv6BdKpdeaapEmBlO8gt5t9e2L81T_IyVxeq7svzkazleN_y7c_8nt-Rl1DxitZ7UrLOuOV3mZyKfxlwQZtNrzKIegRv60DAQQfE7CapRr8_lTUFehXGQ3KaIaNs1UME6ZH3Rd-zwNxX3PwmPWRr4dyNl5rpztw1HH6Pig8WL4UyocXP_EDM4EGBNDp8hHC6Y55tGP-2Op4SRhhcIRhOzcVfnF9leo-WVSctYbMZotXTcQPOf_Ag5Rhrka-vU0ZZ61NWXPQd47ordLpxqWwLpQf1sTgUhWkDOvslHmmgF3I-o8WCAZ6Uid34XrXtJcce7HyM1ZG9WG2k94eE_hwospGtoEHk_UNWaabuoYQfDzQVC9g4VyYLopsnL3XvlqSADeg-zu-0bUVeoawkiaJPPMyVA5ytGB7hZNx6s8yihybO86r2yfLxB-EVcQfcRIVlI8xRaLOGY%3D)** Thank you, [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=f3cad964d55c48b78226486f2ea0666e&_e=kU-Vjgi-S33CFE-zqHL9SqKILvN8NDiFG_Bv6BdKpdeaapEmBlO8gt5t9e2L81T_IyVxeq7svzkazleN_y7c_8nt-Rl1DxitZ7UrLOuOV3mZyKfxlwQZtNrzKIegRv60DAQQfE7CapRr8_lTUFehXGQ3KaIaNs1UME6ZH3Rd-zwNxX3PwmPWRr4dyNl5rpztw1HH6Pig8WL4UyocXP_EDM4EGBNDp8hHC6Y55tGP-2Op4SRhhcIRhOzcVfnF9leo-WVSctYbMZotXTcQPOf_Ao7GGpzIsr6IpDNWyXN4DQ3tdLqspK0B_1bMSvDk0aMxFeTViZeTt3-R0FDImnhfK-gDhhUnKiqikCF38wLqH30fUB3fMr87I5_9p9ej56KdwxPiJCAKLddRQrBm5kIMnH0iWSpfQP1bdaszG-e6k4RQyyyGZQJSPDDmqww_uXFQDk_0d9luic625fRTyYNIt8oHn62ZcA3RzfD3NYr_WZM%3D) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |

Corporate contributions are not permissible. Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: What I’m fighting for in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/06aada706f84d51ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) Hi Peter, First and foremost, I want to say thank you. I don’t have the chance to do so enough. _Without dedicated supporters like you, NONE of our efforts to get out our Team Hern message and grow our conservative coalition would be possible!_ Things are moving fast in Washington, and we have our work cut out for us. We’re fighting back against the Pelosi Democrats’ efforts to rapidly ram bad legislation through Congress, and we’re gearing up aggressively for the policy battles ahead. **In this era of complete Democrat control – with Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi pushing the most radical agenda our nation has ever seen – it’s all hands on deck.** Today, we’re launching a 24-hour March Mid-Month Drive to keep our efforts on track. Our goal is to raise $4,500 from our top online supporters. **[Will you pitch in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to help?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/42ffc180e3434731c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** As you know, I’m focused getting things done on the issues that matter to folks outside of the D.C. bubble. • We need to END earmarks and wasteful spending – taxpayers deserve better. • We need to REFORM Congress to end the era of “career” politicians. I’m proud to be leading the charge for term limits. • And we need to STOP the Biden push to regulate businesses out of existence. President Trump unleashed the full power of our American economy by doing away with a lot of this nonsense that holds us back. Now, all of that progress for economic freedom is at risk! **[Sustain the fight for our Oklahoma values, our economic freedom, and our liberty](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/220cbed8ea3a7623c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Let fight to win and SAVE AMERICA from this disastrous Democrat agenda! \- Kevin [**RUSH $5 DONATION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/1cf38e6dcb5eb96cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $10 DONATION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/ef4b92fbe162e796c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $25 DONATION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/6263ed414c00a13fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $50 DONATION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/2446d4735114efbdc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $100 DONATION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1bb937246f5dea4b/93d0ddb309e62df4c3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Did you get my text?
body:
I shot you a text message yesterday right before I was scheduled to speak before the Florida Legislature.
---
I shot you a text message yesterday right before I was scheduled to speak before the Florida Legislature.
| | | | Patriot,

I shot you a text message yesterday right before I was scheduled to speak before the Florida Legislature.

I wanted to make sure you saw the live stream, but if not, [**here’s the archived video**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/kWjr5telOtSxHLUGjfGvNPiLGS7uc6kyFPmkURjloM1wAt7w_iphtkaVxCTlybQLFlAqLIOVY1wXaeJ9bSFlGx9TIldm_sXR2r9bXP-4XtEqmzpBPZU_NiA0fq6Us6ZyUAwKXDSheR53mQmPPyIBCnHwslZSxMtZOkjib9-R6q4kfri7dzPgWXtnmorUCoLjQeAj5pu7aIfggCcJ_uqZ07K4VsDarJr4u590rQkq6H3slZnCbF71HJvlN1OsMBQ_dXlwiUchF0Bi-zXmQzChzD2Kd2Ljnv18DMAeSbDP).

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/MmJzWOYGEI82Udj_bB74WOdqdjGyOixocrhJJAvPfwiB490OyMpVNGkSae85MYjvpb9moZY8sfq0oM03EMuAJL32F0dvCxD04JaSawgmuC3_M42VVrugkBpoLLAF3v4Axd3rwbnVPnVbTyOBpc3YmF4uXspgHmmTLv3TpjlknedwvMM2EmxOLxtWMpaiYpPyKl-2UWGNs0KWWHdnSEZAijxntWzWLevfobg8KM8y4uWCNKDmQge2ciVHgq8dQu_I8k3xQ36Aj-7f3HxE6fnP7N9Fi0X_iUgshqUe8wmy)
On Sunday, I drove six hours from Palm Beach to the state capitol in Tallahassee to speak to the House Appropriations Committee on Monday about House Bill 7013 that would help put an end to Big Tech Censorship and deplatforming — **and it went VERY well!**

**The Florida legislative committee passed the resolution to consider the bill by a wide margin!**

While the bill still needs a lot of work and needs to be amended to address the points I spoke about yesterday, if it is corrected and becomes law, it will serve as flagship legislation for other states to hold Big Tech accountable for Cancel Culture!

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of 3/15: Keep up the pressure & protect our elections!
body:
| |
---
This week, we must continue to pressure the Senate to reject S. 1, the bill that, should it become law, will codify and cement into place the corruption that we saw during the 2020 election. It must be defeated.

[Read through a summary of this monstrosity on our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb24taW50ZWdyaXR5Lz9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=u3g1mxuLIZLbOCKICT_zAA) and use our [how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzUwMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=cgaQoRVF4HMiMc-mXWoN5g) to fight back, and make sure to share these resources widely. You can also learn more about the bill reading [this social media thread.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aHJlYWRyZWFkZXJhcHAuY29tL3RocmVhZC8xMzY3MzM5ODc4MzIxNjg0NDgwLmh0bWw_bWlkPTQzNTAzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=EnLoZQYm2DYSO1xegIVotg)

We also want to thank Senator Cruz, and call certain corporations headquartered in Georgia who are now trying to stop election integrity bills from passing in GA.

See below for details.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**CALL YOUR SENATORS**
There are two messages you need to give your Senators [when you call](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=S_MsYENuj8xuhSp1TmLfgg). Also, be sure to call with these messages whether your Senators are Republican or Democrat.

**1\. Tell them to vote NO on S. 1.** Tell them they must protect election transparency by voting no. No amendments can fix this bill. They must vote NO.
**2\. Tell them to reject Xavier Becerra as Joe Biden’s Health and Human Services Secretary.** He has now been voted out of committee and is moving on to a vote of the full Senate. The committee vote was deadlocked, which shows that the pressure is working. Let’s keep it up!

You can read more about him (and sign the petition to show your opposition to his nomination) [on our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XWI7wEqrk74pDz44ujhVYw)[,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=qnpT8imKDIngWRKDyIQOGw) and why he is so dangerous, [before you call](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=0puKYUwsNdygVlA_19a_tw).
|
---
**THANK SENATOR CRUZ**
Let’s show our gratitude to Sen. Cruz for all he is doing to expose Xavier Becerra’s radical record. If you’re on social media, thank him there. If you’re not, call his office to say thank you.

You can find Sen. Cruz on:
* Twitter: **[@tedcruz](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS90ZWRjcnV6P21pZD00MzUwMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=MjZmsZtUrBYAobYTTcmcMw)**
* Facebook: **[/tedcruzpage](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3RlZGNydXpwYWdlP21pZD00MzUwMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=rN6-YQCJXca_a6MDJttXng)**
* Parler: **[@tedcruz](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXJsZXIuY29tL3Byb2ZpbGUvVGVkQ3J1ei9wb3N0cz9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_YJHMQ1FUCXpbiRDOcpfrQ)**
* D.C. Office: **(202) 224-5922**

|
---
**CONTACT THE FOLLOWING CORPERATIONS**
There are two election integrity bills on their way to final passage in Georgia, and the left is hopping mad. Nobody is surprised to see them using lies to intimidate and bully companies that are headquartered in Georgia to oppose these bills. The left is saying precautions like making sure signatures match between a ballot and the voter file are racist and violates the right to vote.

This is insane. It hurts everyone if elections can be easily corrupted or stolen. Every legitimate vote, from every legitimate voter, no matter his or her race, is diluted and negated by fraudulent votes.

Unfortunately, the people who run these companies are cowards, and the left is really good at scaring them into doing what they want.

We need to counteract the left’s bullying by contacting these same companies and telling them they are on the wrong side by opposing election transparency bills. Tell them they are tainting their brands by opposing efforts to make elections secure, fair, and transparent. Tell them it is clear that these companies support cheating and fraud. Finally, tell them to retract their statements of opposition, and to let the duly elected representatives of the people of Georgia do what the people elected them to do – make our elections honest!

They need to hear from us or they will believe that the only side out there is the left’s side. The information below is what the left is sending out to their activists.

If you have time, please call and email these companies. Otherwise, pick one – calling or emailing. Please make sure to forward this to everyone you know because we must show the companies that it’s time to stop getting involved in the legislative process!

If you don’t have much time, [use this link](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDc1LTcxMDE0ZTEwYjEyZDQ2MjI4NDI4NTU2MzQ3ZjE0NDdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL3Byb3RlY3QtZmFpci1lbGVjdGlvbnMtaW4tZ2VvcmdpYT9taWQ9NDM1MDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=MYMIA6HKa2IANuzP6AMHhA) to send a pre-written email to all of the CEO’s for you, and it takes seconds to do. Then share the link!
**AFLAC**
**Dan Amos**

name: Zachary Meunier
subject: not what we expected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
We had no way of knowing this would become the closest federal election in recent history! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26341844/276648798/-992972575?refcode=210316-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMxODA3MC1hYzg2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0knxtkqPhYnBsldegIQIvfxEenNeLGjKXgeXUyJMnA=)
---
Hey Peter! As you know, we’re still in one of the closest races in the country here in IA-02. **Rita is separated from her opponent by _just six votes_ , and this past week, the House committee voted to let our contest move forward.** But the Republicans aren’t giving up. They’re doing everything they can to stop the outstanding 22 votes from being counted, _**with Rita’s opponent even going so far as to call these legally-cast ballots “illegitimate”.**_ [_**Peter, we can’t let these votes be suppressed. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20IN=20GOP=20Chairman?=
subject: Thank Connie Lawson for her service!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Will you join me in thanking Connie Lawson for her dedication to our state? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470310?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ac27bde37&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Connie Lawson has done so much good for our state and Hoosiers have been lucky to have her in public life. Since taking office as Secretary of State in 2012, she has dutifully served our state, helping Indiana become a national role model in running safe and secure elections.

Now that Holli Sullivan has been sworn in as Indiana’s new Secretary of State, we’d like to take a moment to wish Connie well and officially thank her for her service to Indiana. We’re putting together a statewide “Thank You” card for her, and we’re going to send her the list of everyone who’s signed it tomorrow morning. [_**Will you please join me in giving her your best well-wishes? **_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b0ef8c3835&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [SIGN CONNIE'S THANK YOU CARD!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=763c2790be&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SIGN CONNIE'S THANK YOU CARD!")
---
| Connie Lawson retired as the longest serving Secretary of State in Indiana history! Thanks to her dutiful work during the unprecedented 2020 elections, Hoosiers were able to confidently, and safely, make their voices heard in our election.

She is leaving big shoes to fill in the statehouse – but we’re sure her contributions to our state won’t be stopping any time soon.

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman
---
| [SIGN CONNIE'S THANK YOU CARD!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7bdee75b2f&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SIGN CONNIE'S THANK YOU CARD!")

subject: Biden’s STILL fueling the border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Millions of Americans across the country are struggling [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a54da85bd0aa4d3a8904a833f802fe58&_e=hTTKiIZF1FUFrI5WBU1cG0pK1ZVkFZQRjghDdhtZbIGnUyJEoCw7a9MvO8-w81lbusVeqakNnltM35MRAJ7xDJ9b8UTDXW9bC-4YQeV080ikmfI9rfHW4DfodKjXnWB8Dux2VWlx2X-qJqJd7NPJhaC1eu57uQfLbXGR7R62-SzpD-76KqO-1o1dnG0JdY0bUxBxQLF6pEIcIxeQhS__n7ma_Ft43o0qJfprUnWpRuZuccOSWcj0EMZx2UPGAmgLIl3EeqsZSuiv9ZwLp9TtPuxl__W5AYVilZZkNwa0Jxt76MPnqqVGcCmPutSuwbNjvSBNT3KLgaaqjzOmTkrvCAm94N7_vs-yb5rx-IfjXRU%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Millions of Americans across the country are struggling—struggling to find work, pay bills or get ahead, and yet once again the Biden Administration prioritizes non-citizens over US citizens.

It doesn’t have to be this way. We must ENFORCE IMMIGRATION LAWS already on the books, and reinstate important policies like the public charge rule, which prevents non-citizens on government welfare from receiving automatic residency.

**I WON'T BE SILENT!**

Today, I wrote to Alejandro Mayorkas, Secretary of Homeland Security expressing my grave concerns and demanding public charge laws be enforced.

We must prevent taxpayer-funded illegal immigrants from gaining an advantage over American citizens!

Joe Biden has recklessly incentivized illegal immigrants to flood the border by reversing Donald Trump’s stout border security policies.

The Biden Administration bears sole responsibility for the unmitigated crisis at our southern border, but I will continue my fight against these reckless liberal policies.
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a54da85bd0aa4d3a8904a833f802fe58&_e=hTTKiIZF1FUFrI5WBU1cG3Ab8ovb-jDXNWd9IgpwACfC_P_HGUEAll6PF7oQqyQgaHI_F_kT2X0nyTsIf3t8-bUN9Bop6ZzENvGaZkT0p-21UjLYCHYP6YRqYHkGsDfSowPtFIUAmfJ2ndZGHoPsjdaQCEx-XYnORGZEGe8Qa9tXxjOiAylR8tS_zfANNACGEeXftiBVtonJ01EmU0IJTyzy1KbDy4inxAAADhf0ti3anWuUdtTBfbK_CkEO_Fq4SvpKE5syGjVfnkpHbCQ-VtPRAB7H4FHR9gFsyxpQzThlWdVUGwawDV5UNbD_QDBCC6lR8lhssc6Whe-Q3WekOCiywsXjmDRdePztXc1HpJSgP--sKBwb7uz3ZFp-A7IrQRDOeJeZ0Z1xDYUCaC4tEw%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: Millions of Americans across the country are struggling | | Peter, Millions of Americans across the country are struggling—struggling to find work, pay bills or get ahead, and yet once again the Biden Administration prioritizes non-citizens over US citizens. It doesn’t have to be this way. We must ENFORCE IMMIGRATION LAWS already on the books, and reinstate important policies like the public charge rule, which prevents non-citizens on government welfare from receiving automatic residency. I WON'T BE SILENT! Today, I wrote to Alejandro Mayorkas, Secretary of Homeland Security expressing my grave concerns and demanding public charge laws be enforced. We must prevent taxpayer-funded illegal immigrants from gaining an advantage over American citizens! Joe Biden has recklessly incentivized illegal immigrants to flood the border by reversing Donald Trump’s stout border security policies. The Biden Administration bears sole responsibility for the unmitigated crisis at our southern border, but I will continue my fight against these reckless liberal policies. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

**From Your Capitol – March 16, 2021**
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Today the Mississippi House of Representatives used an unusual procedure to revive the Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2021. In an effort to revive the “Tax Freedom Act of 2021” the House replaced the language in a Senate Bill (SB2971) with the language of the Tax Freedom Act. This action forces the senate to consider our proposal and either make amendments or kill the tax cutting bill. Because of feedback received from citizens over the past couple of weeks, there has been a few changes to the bill:
* The new language has NO increase in sales tax for farmers, loggers, and manufacturers.
* Tax free earned income was changed from $50k for singles $100k for couples to $40k for singles $80k for couples,
* In four years the tax free income changes to $80k/$160k and continue phasing out completely like the original plan.

The Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2021, will bring tax relief for Mississippi Families and eliminate 1.9 billion dollars of income tax taken from the working people of our state. In addition to income tax relief, sales taxes on groceries will be reduced from 7 percent to just 3.5 percent by fiscal year 2027. Mississippi's sales tax on groceries will be below that of both Tennessee and Alabama. For a Mississippi family whose income is 40,000 dollars/year this will be a $3000 tax cut. To create a more fair and equitable foundation for collecting revenues to pay for essential government services, sales tax will increase from 7 percent to 9.5 percent. Many have asked about how the increased sales tax will affect families. The average Mississippi family will pay an additional $100/year in sales tax, and even in a year you purchase a new car your additional sales tax will only equal $750, well below the tax cuts. I am proud to support this tax cut and will continue to work to ensure your taxes are lower and spent more wisely.
---
